summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No security-sensitive refs were present, and the job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise-pr actions, so all outcomes are non-mutating keep classifications.

actions.reason: Keep open as related inventory work; broad feature/config/docs surface, failing proof, and disabled merge/fix gates make close or finalization inappropriate.
Keep open with the linked sessions JSON issue; the PR is useful but still needs proof/check resolution and maintainer judgment before any final action.
Keep open with the linked doctor issue; it is not a duplicate/low-signal PR and has active maintainer rebase guidance.
Keep as independent inventory work; no safe close-style action is permitted or supported by the hydrated evidence.
